artPrompt: A sly green goblin rogue slinks low through a firelit carnival midway, one long-fingered hand slipping toward an unseen pocket, eyes flicking sideways with a wicked grin, body coiled in furtive motion. Strings of lurid lights and a juggler's blurred shapes glow behind. The gesture is all thieving stealth. Wide landscape, carnival red and hot gold washes bleeding into smoky black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Midway Pickpocket
text:
Menace
Whenever Midway Pickpocket deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card and you create a Treasure token from their pocket. (Finders keepers.)
flavorText: While you watched the juggler, he watched your wallet.
